summary: Every non-trivial change is routed through one decision card — path (process depth), class (authority), executor, versioning impact — presented verdict-first for the authority's GO.

rules.rule: On a genuine path/methodology/executor fork, emit the routing decision card and wait for the authority's GO; trivial+reversible+no-contract work takes the direct path with no card.

On non-trivial work the card leaves one durable 'routing' record in the decision register — field shape per REFERENCE-ROUTING-CARD-READINESS-001 §1 (kind, path, methodology, executor, recommendation, authority_go, ref).
When the executor is an autonomous coder, dispatch through the coder spine (orchestration + safe-identity + launch runbook) — never improvised; no ready launch-surface → stand it up first.
Silently resolve a genuine path/methodology/executor choice that belongs to the authority — the card is presented verdict-first and the agent waits for GO.

watch.note: behavioral, live-agent only; partially exercised by the routing-card golden task
